vomiting.advice: Home: Paracetamol 500mg, warm fluids, rest. Doctor: Paracetamol 650mg twice daily after food for 3 days

body.advice: Home: Rest in dark room, avoid screen. Doctor: Paracetamol 650mg + Domperidone once during pain

pain.advice: Home: Rest in dark room, avoid screen. Doctor: Paracetamol 650mg + Domperidone once during pain

headache.advice: Home: Rest in dark room, avoid screen. Doctor: Paracetamol 650mg + Domperidone once during pain

nose.advice: Home: Paracetamol 500mg, warm fluids, rest. Doctor: Paracetamol 650mg twice daily after food for 3 days

fatigue.advice: Home: Do not self-medicate. Doctor: Immediate hospital visit – ECG and cardiologist consultation required

nausea.advice: Home: Paracetamol 500mg, warm fluids, rest. Doctor: Paracetamol 650mg twice daily after food for 3 days

sore.advice: Home: ORS, light food, fluids. Doctor: ORS after every loose stool + Ondansetron 4mg if vomiting

throat.advice: Home: ORS, light food, fluids. Doctor: ORS after every loose stool + Ondansetron 4mg if vomiting
